title: Jean Caves
description: Better overworld caves, add 5 biomes to caves, and 2 for surface.
body:
![Jean caves better vanilla caves](https://i.imgur.com/BqFyxNZ.png)

This datapack adds 5 biomes to minecraft caves, making them more alive, but with some vanilla vibes, it doesn't disturb too much de gen of the caves.

**Redstone caves, amethyst caves, dry caves, cold caves and pale caves.**

5 New structures, 1 ruin for each biome, you will find a music disc for each structure.

![Custom discs and claws](https://i.imgur.com/rUAwBTQ.png)

The custom mobs inside structures drops Claws, the claws are just iron pickaxes with another texture, and the diamond sword attributes.

Aslo you need optifine or ETF for fabric, to see the mobs variants in the resourcepack

![Amethyst ruins](https://i.imgur.com/q95jDuB.png)

**See my other resources:**

[Amethyst Expansion](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amethyst-expansion-dp),
[Copper Expansion](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-expansion-pale-garden),
[Savanna Update](https://modrinth.com/datapack/savanna-update),
[Snowy Expansion](https://modrinth.com/datapack/snowy-expansion), [Extreme Worldgen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/extreme-worldgen)
